title: China industrial profits jump 24.7% in April, fastest gain in over two years despite headwinds
summary_full: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.
summary_public: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.
